name: business-ops-dashboard-page
title: Operations dashboard
description: Staffing, schedule exceptions, compliance signals, and display-only review actions.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-page-implementation.generated.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.suite-shell",
  "lane": "business-ops",
  "implementationStatus": "renderable-primitive-factory-page",
  "source": "registry/suites/business-ops/suite-shell.json",
  "primitiveFactory": {
    "version": "2026-06-09.framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs",
    "implementationStatus": "framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
    "title": "Operations dashboard",
    "description": "Staffing, schedule exceptions, compliance signals, and display-only review actions.",
    "components": [
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "panel"
    ]
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "/business-ops/dashboard",
      "page": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
      "title": "Operations dashboard",
      "blocks": [
        "block.business-ops.kpis",
        "block.business-ops.exceptions",
        "block.business-ops.agent-review"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.kpis",
      "title": "Operational KPIs",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-kpis-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "long-content"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.exceptions",
      "title": "Schedule exceptions",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-exceptions-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "empty",
        "error"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.agent-review",
      "title": "Review queue",
      "component": "agent-panel",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-agent-review-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "error"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "components": [
    "agent-panel",
    "button",
    "data-list",
    "panel"
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "renderedBlockCount": 3,
    "responsiveLayout": "single-column-safe generated composition",
    "a11yStructure": "page routes compose labelled resident block implementations",
    "displayOnly": true
  },
  "runtime": {
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "registry/suites/business-ops/suite-shell.json",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone page descriptor and primitive-factory implementation from the authored suite shell; full React page runtime remains pending.
